resources.title: Armo Platform
resources.evidence_quote: So go check out ARMOR platform. Use the custom controls and AI to help you generate all the Regal that you need for your cluster.

resources.title: Rego Playground
resources.evidence_quote: First, open a new tab in your browser and search for the Rego playground and click go. This is an interactive playground that allows you to test your Ragel policies.

resources.title: Open Policy Agent
resources.evidence_quote: Regal is a language that is part of open policy agent.
